docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,053.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMANN, KAREN VIRGINIA AKA REEM,KAREN VIRGINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMANN, KAREN VIRGINIA AKA REEM,KAREN VIRGINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUMANN, KAREN VIRGINIA AKA REEM,KAREN VIRGINA $2,053.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,074.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $750.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $276.60 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMANN, KAREN VIRGINIA AKA REEM,KAREN VIRGINA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMANN, KAREN VIRGINIA AKA REEM,KAREN VIRGINA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMANN, KAREN VIRGINIA AKA REEM,KAREN VIRGINA
